Ntc And Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar May-15-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Alexander Green's motion for a protective order is ordered off calendar. A hearsay proof of personal service is not competent evidence that the motion was served. The proof of personal service must be signed by the person who actually served the motion. Commissioner Bruce Chan. Not reported.

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-15-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar/fee paid. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. CSR#7782. (212)
